mapper.select: SELECT c.id AS model_id, c.model_code AS model_code, c.display_name AS display_name, c.max_context AS max_context, c.max_output AS max_output, c.input_price AS input_price, c.output_price AS output_price, c.supports_vision AS supports_vision, c.supports_tools AS supports_tools, c.supports_stream AS supports_stream, p.id AS provider_id, p.code AS provider_code, p.name AS provider_name, p.base_url AS base_url, p.protocol AS protocol FROM model_config c JOIN model_provider p ON p.id = c.provider_id WHERE c.enabled = 1 AND p.enabled = 1 AND c.deleted = 0 AND p.deleted = 0 ORDER BY p.sort, c.sort

SELECT c.id AS model_id, c.model_code AS model_code, c.display_name AS display_name, c.max_context AS max_context, c.max_output AS max_output, c.input_price AS input_price, c.output_price AS output_price, c.supports_vision AS supports_vision, c.supports_tools AS supports_tools, c.supports_stream AS supports_stream, p.id AS provider_id, p.code AS provider_code, p.name AS provider_name, p.base_url AS base_url, p.api_key AS api_key, p.protocol AS protocol FROM model_config c JOIN model_provider p ON p.id = c.provider_id WHERE c.model_code = #{code} AND c.deleted = 0 AND p.deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
